turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, I want to schedule a routine check-up for next week if possible.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Calling from the number we have on file. I speaking with Alex

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes, that's me. Can we set up that check-up for next week?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It's June 12, 1990.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I need your full date of birth to continue. Could you please tell me your date of birth?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Sure, it's June 12 1990.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider for your routine checkup?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I don't have a specific provider in mind. Can you tell me who’s available?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It looks like you already have a routine checkup appointment booked if you want to reschedule or cancel that appointment I can help with that.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I wasn't aware of that. Can you tell me when it is?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No problem. Would you like details about your current routine? Checkup appointment.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes, please. What are the details?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Cancel it.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I just want to schedule a new check-up for next week instead. Can we do that?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm unable to book a new routine, checkup since you already have 1, scheduled if you'd like I can help you reschedule your existing appointment to next week.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Can you tell me the date of my existing appointment first?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I don't have access to your current appointment details but I can connect you with a team member who can provide that information.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: That sounds good. Can you transfer me to someone who can help?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Connecting you to a representative please. Wait hello you've reached the pretty good. AI test line goodbye.

turns.speaker: patient
